text.content:
2
*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

# allOps - a list of all replicants, created or existing
# newOps - the subset that were just created
# template - table DAT specifying the replicator attributes
# master - the master operator

	for c in newOps:
		c.allowCooking = True

		pass

	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������X# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	mvpar = iop.Mv.par

	cuenum = int(op('../spec')[1,'num'])
	
	if panelValue.name=='lselect' :
		
		if not parent().panel.ctrl :
		
			#ext.MvPlay.GoToCue(cuenum, 0, 0)
			#ext.MvPlay.GoToCue(cuenum, 1, parent().panel.shift==0)			
			ext.MvPlay.GoToCue(cuenum, 2, 0)
		
		else:
			moviein = parent.Mv.op('moviein')
			time = moviein.par.index / moviein.rate
			cuepar = op(op('../spec')[1,'path']).par

			#cueparPlay.Cuebeauty = time
			#cueparPlay.Cuestart = time
			cueparPlay.Cueend = time
	return

# panelValue - the PanelValue object that changed
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def onOffToOn(panelValue):
	iop.Mv.par.Curcue = 0
	cuenum = op('../spec')[1,'num'].val
	ipar.MvPlay.Editcue = cuenum
	ext.MvPlay.GoToCue(cuenum, 1, 0)
	return

text.content:

*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������V# me - this DAT
# panelValue - the PanelValue object that changed
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	global first 
	mvpar = iop.Mv.par

	cuenum = int(op('spec')[1,'num'])
	first = 1 if (mvpar.Curcue != cuenum) else 0
	mvpar.Curcue = cuenum

	if first :
		# alt to play on click
		ext.MvPlay.GoToTime(ipar.MvPlay.Curcuestart, play=parent().panel.alt)
	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	if not first and not parent().panel.alt:
		doit()
	return

def onToOff(panelValue):
	mvpar = iop.Mv.par
	mvplaypar = parent.MvPlay.par

	cuenum = mvpar.Curcue

	ipar.MvPlay.Editcue = cuenum
	mvpar.Curcue = cuenum
	mvpar.Play = (not parent().panel.shift) and (parent().panel.v>0 and parent().panel.v<1)
	return

def doit():
	mvpar = iop.Mv.par
	mvplaypar = parent.MvPlay.par

	cuestart = float(op('spec')[1,'start'])
	crosslength = float(op('spec')[1,'crosslength'])
	
	u = min(max(0, parent().panel.u),.9999)
	time = cuestart + (0 if first else (u * crosslength))
	
	ext.MvPlay.GoToTime(time, play=0)
	ipar.MvPlay.Iphase = time / iop.Mv.par.Length

	return

*�����������������w# me is this DAT.
# 
# panelValue is the PanelValue object that changed.
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	ipar = ext.iRange
	ipar.Lmr = int(me.parent().panel.insideu*2.99)
	ipar.Initu = me.parent(2).panel.u
	ipar.Initstart = parent.MvPlay.par.Viewstart
	ipar.Initlength = parent.MvPlay.par.Viewlength
	ipar.Initend = ipar.Initstart + ipar.Initlength
	
	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	ipar = ext.iRange

	gl = iop.Mv.par.Length.eval()
	insideu = me.parent(2).panel.u
	deltatime = gl * (insideu - ipar.Initu)
	deltatime = int(deltatime*1000)/1000
	
	minlength = iop.Mv.par.Length / 100.

	if ipar.Lmr==0:
		start = round(min(ipar.Initend-1., max(0., ipar.Initstart + deltatime)), 2)
		parent.MvPlay.par.Viewstart = start
		parent.MvPlay.par.Viewlength = round(max(1., ipar.Initend-start), 2)	
	elif ipar.Lmr==1:
		parent.MvPlay.par.Viewstart = round(ipar.Initstart + deltatime, 2)
	else:
		end = round(min(gl, max(ipar.Initstart+1., ipar.Initend + deltatime)), 2)	
		parent.MvPlay.par.Viewlength = round(end-ipar.Initstart, 2)	
	return

def onToOff(panelValue):
	return

text.content:
2
*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

# sampleIndex is the index of the channel thats changed.
# val is the numeric value of the changed sample.
# prev is the previous sample value.
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the CHOP Execute DAT.

def valueChange(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):

	ppanel = parent().panel
	
	if not parent().par.Rollerzoom :
		return

	if ppanel.inside == 0 :
		return
		
	insideu = ppanel.insideu
	insidev = ppanel.insidev
	
	ext.Zoom.scale(insideu, insidev, val-prev)
			
	return

*�����������������# panelValue - the PanelValue object that changed

def onOffToOn(panelValue):
	ppanel = panelValue.owner.panel

	if panelValue.name == 'mselect' :
		ipar.Zoom.Saveuv = ppanel.u + ppanel.v
		ipar.Zoom.Downu = ppanel.u
		ipar.Zoom.Downv = ppanel.v

	elif panelValue.name == 'lselect' :
		ipar.Zoom.Downu = panelValue.owner.panel.u
		ipar.Zoom.Downv = panelValue.owner.panel.v
		ipar.Zoom.Downtx = ipar.Zoom.Tx
		ipar.Zoom.Downty = ipar.Zoom.Ty

	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	ppanel = panelValue.owner.panel

	if panelValue.name == 'mselect' :
		uv = ppanel.u + ppanel.v
		if uv != ipar.Zoom.Saveuv :
			ext.Zoom.scale(ipar.Zoom.Downu, ipar.Zoom.Downv, 10*(uv - ipar.Zoom.Saveuv))
			ipar.Zoom.Saveuv = uv

	elif panelValue.name == 'lselect' :
		ipar.Zoom.Tx = ipar.Zoom.Downtx + (panelValue.owner.panel.u-ipar.Zoom.Downu)
		ipar.Zoom.Ty = ipar.Zoom.Downty + (panelValue.owner.panel.v-ipar.Zoom.Downv)

	return

def valueChange(panelValue):

*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

*�����������������(def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Slider.Flip :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideru', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parentw
		h = parenth

		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parentw
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		
		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parenth), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'u click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '0', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parentw*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		
		fieldw = parentw-ppar.Borderlow-ppar.Borderhigh
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			fieldw = min(60, fieldw)
		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', fieldw, '1'] )

	else :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'sliderv', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvl', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parenth
		h = parentw
		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parenth
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )

		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parentw), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sy', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'ty', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'v click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '1', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parentw*osize, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', 40, '1'] )
		
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )

	parent().par.bgcolorr = ppar.Bgcolorr.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorg = ppar.Bgcolorg.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorb = ppar.Bgcolorb.eval()
	parent().par.bgalpha = ppar.Bgcolora.eval()
	
	fontsize = 12 if ppar.Fontauto==True else ppar.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'dispmethod', ['automatic','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	#scop.appendRow( ['field/text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )

	if ppar.Labelalign == 'left' :
		pos = 0 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl-.01)
	elif ppar.Labelalign == 'center' :
		pos = (labr-1-.02)/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl+sh-1)/2
	else :
		pos = (labr-1-.02) if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sh-1-.01)
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsetx', pos, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'npasses', int(ppar.Showoffset), '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'sy', 4/h, '1'] )
		
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

*�����������������(def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Slider.Flip :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideru', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parentw
		h = parenth

		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parentw
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		
		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parenth), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'u click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '0', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parentw*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		
		fieldw = parentw-ppar.Borderlow-ppar.Borderhigh
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			fieldw = min(60, fieldw)
		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', fieldw, '1'] )

	else :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'sliderv', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvl', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parenth
		h = parentw
		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parenth
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )

		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parentw), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sy', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'ty', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'v click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '1', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parentw*osize, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', 40, '1'] )
		
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )

	parent().par.bgcolorr = ppar.Bgcolorr.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorg = ppar.Bgcolorg.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorb = ppar.Bgcolorb.eval()
	parent().par.bgalpha = ppar.Bgcolora.eval()
	
	fontsize = 12 if ppar.Fontauto==True else ppar.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'dispmethod', ['automatic','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	#scop.appendRow( ['field/text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )

	if ppar.Labelalign == 'left' :
		pos = 0 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl-.01)
	elif ppar.Labelalign == 'center' :
		pos = (labr-1-.02)/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl+sh-1)/2
	else :
		pos = (labr-1-.02) if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sh-1-.01)
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsetx', pos, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'npasses', int(ppar.Showoffset), '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'sy', 4/h, '1'] )
		
	return

2
*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)

	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

timer = op('timerStep')

def onOffToOn(panelValue):

	ext.MvPlay.resetPhaseToNow()
	ext.MvPlay.scrubStart()	
	
	op('stepSize')[0,0] = -1.	
	timer.par.start.pulse()
						
	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	u = panelValue.owner.panel.u
	
	gain = 0. 
	if u>1. :
		gain = u-1.
	elif u<0. :
		gain = u

	op('stepSize')[0,0] = -1. + gain
						
	return

def onOnToOff(panelValue):
	timer = op('timerStep')

	timer.par.initialize.pulse()
	ext.MvPlay.scrubEnd(-1., 0)	
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������y# me - this DAT
# scriptOp - the OP which is cooking
#
# press 'Setup Parameters' in the OP to call this function to re-create the parameters.
def onSetupParameters(scriptOp):
	return

# called whenever custom pulse parameter is pushed
def onPulse(par):
	return

def onCook(scriptOp):
	try:
		scriptOp.text = setupMenuOptions(scriptOp)
	except:
		scriptOp.text = "name\tlabel"
	#scriptOp.copy(scriptOp.inputs[0])	# no need to call .clear() above when copying
	#scriptOp.insertRow(['color', 'size', 'shape'], 0)
	#scriptOp.appendRow(['red', '3', 'square'])
	#scriptOp[1,0] += '**'

	return

def setupMenuOptions(scriptOp):
	if hasattr(parent.Widget.par, 'Synctoboundmenu'):
		parent.Widget.par.Menulabels.readOnly = \
			parent.Widget.par.Menunames.readOnly = \
									parent.Widget.par.Synctoboundmenu.eval()
	externalMenuTable = scriptOp.inputs[0]
	if externalMenuTable.numCols:
		labels = []
		#['AllRows_FirstCols', 'LabelRow_FirstCols', 'LabelRow_LabeledCols']
		if parent.Widget.par.Tableformat.eval() ==\
												'ExcludeFirstRow_LabeledCols':
			names = [c.val for c in externalMenuTable.col('name')[1:]]
			labelCol = externalMenuTable.col('label')
			if labelCol:
				labels = [c.val for c in labelCol[1:]]
		else:
			names = [c.val for c in externalMenuTable.col(0)]
			labelCol = externalMenuTable.col(1)
			if labelCol:
				labels = [c.val for c in labelCol]
			if parent.Widget.par.Tableformat.eval() == \
												'ExcludeFirstRow_NumberedCols':
				names.pop(0)
				if labels:
					labels.pop(0)
	else:
		names = tdu.split(parent.Widget.par.Menunames)
		labels = tdu.split(parent.Widget.par.Menulabels)
	finalNames = names
	finalLabels = []
	for i, name in enumerate(names):
		if i < len(labels):
			finalLabels.append(labels[i])
		else:
			finalLabels.append(name)
	return 'name\tlabel\n' + \
			'\n'.join([finalNames[i] + '\t' + finalLabels[i]
					   		for i in range(len(finalNames))])

TDF = op.TDModules.mod.TDFunctions

class FolderExt(SubWidgetExt):
	"""
	FolderExt description
	"""
	def __init__(self, ownerComp):
		# The component to which this extension is attached
		self.parPrefix = 'Folder'
		SubWidgetExt.__init__(self, ownerComp)

	def onPanelEvent(self, event, panelValue):
		valueId = 'Value0'
		setattr(parent.Widget.par, valueId, panelValue.owner.digits)
		
	def makePanelExecute(self):
		SubWidgetExt.makePanelExecute(self, self.getDockExpressionToOwner()
									  + ".ops('tab*')")

text.content:
2
*�����������������6# Every time moviePlayer changes to a new movie, this is activated by
# clicking .par.start.pulse().  What it does is specified by parameters
# Source Type, File and Movie Spec, as well as the internal parameters
# on page "Timer" of iparMvPlay which controls how/where the movie starts.

# It is also activated by the extensions GoToMovieFile(), GoToMvSpec()
# and DropMovieFIle()

movieinfo = op('movieinfo')
moviein = op('moviein')
timer = op('timer')


def onInitialize(timerOp):
	ipar.MvPlay.Status = 'initializing'
	return 0

def onStart(timerOp):

	# copy set 1 to set 2
	#print('starting movie', parent.MvPlay.par.Sourcetype.eval(), parent.MvPlay.par.File.val, parent.MvPlay.par.Mvspec.val)
	ipar.MvPlay.Backsourcetype2 = ipar.MvPlay.Backsourcetype1

	ipar.MvPlay.Backfileval2 = ipar.MvPlay.Backfileval1
	ipar.MvPlay.Backfileexpr2 = ipar.MvPlay.Backfileexpr1
	ipar.MvPlay.Backfilemode2 = ipar.MvPlay.Backfilemode1

	ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecval2 = ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecval1
	ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecexpr2 = ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecexpr1
	ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecmode2= ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecmode1

	# copy current settings to set 1
	ipar.MvPlay.Backsourcetype1 = parent.MvPlay.par.Sourcetype.eval()

	ipar.MvPlay.Backfileval1 = parent.MvPlay.par.File.val
	ipar.MvPlay.Backfileexpr1 = parent.MvPlay.par.File.expr
	ipar.MvPlay.Backfilemode1 = parent.MvPlay.par.File.mode

	ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecval1 = parent.MvPlay.par.Mvspec.val
	ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecexpr1 = parent.MvPlay.par.Mvspec.expr
	ipar.MvPlay.Backmvspecmode1 = parent.MvPlay.par.Mvspec.mode

	if parent.MvPlay.par.Transition == 'cut' :
		op('cache').par.active = 0

def onSegmentEnter(timerOp, segment, interrupt):
	stage = op('segments')[segment+1,'stage']
	#print(absTime.frame, 'enter', 'stage', stage)

	if stage == 'prepnext' :
		prepNext()
	elif stage == 'loadinfo' :
		loadInfo()
	elif stage == 'load' :
		load()
	elif stage == 'delay' :
		delay()
	elif stage == 'fadein' :
		fadeIn()


def whileTimerActive(timerOp, segment, cycle, fraction):
	stage = op('segments')[segment+1,'stage']
	#print(absTime.frame, 'in stage', stage, 'cycle ', int(cycle))

	if stage == 'loadinfocheck' :
		loadInfoCheck(cycle)
	elif stage == 'loadcheck' :
		loadCheck(cycle)



# HERE IS THE FULL SEQUENCE IN THE ACTUAL ORDER OF OPERATION AS PER segments TABLE

def prepNext():

	op('cache').par.active = 0
	op('audiomovie').lock = True
	op('endCueBlackZero').lock = True

	moviein.par.play = 0

	# prepare iop pointer to the mvspec we will use
	sourcetype = parent().par.Sourcetype.eval()
	mvspec = parent().par.Mvspec.eval()

	if sourcetype == 'filepath' :
		op('mvspec').par.File = parent.MvPlay.par.File
		parent.MvPlay.par.iop2.expr = "op('./mvspec')"
		ext.MvPlay.ResetValuesAndCues()

	else:   # it is an mvspec
		if mvspec.parent() == parent(2) :
			iopobj = "op('" + mvspec.name + "')"
		else:
			iopobj = "op('" + mvspec.path + "')"
		parent.MvPlay.par.iop2.expr = iopobj

	# should not have to do this
	op('endCueBlackZero').cook(force=True)


def loadInfo():
	movieinfo.preload()


def loadInfoCheck(cycle):
	# cannot rely on only isFullyPreRead to go on
	if not movieinfo.isPreloading and not movieinfo.isPreloading :

		# push movie info to Mv read-only pararmeters
		ext.MvPlay.updateMvSpecInfo()

		# and make the player's range UI fit the new movie length
		if op('ui') :
			parent.MvPlay.par.Viewstart = 0
			parent.MvPlay.par.Viewlength = iop.Mv.par.Length.eval()
			parent.MvPlay.par.Subview = (parent.MvPlay.par.Viewlength > 120.)

		# if explicitly setting time, set it here
		if ipar.MvPlay.Overridephaseonopen == 'cue' :
			ipar.MvPlay.Iphase = ext.MvPlay.ConvertCueToPhase(ipar.MvPlay.Cueonopen, 0)
			if ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen > -1 :
				iop.Mv.par.Play = ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen==1
			if ipar.MvPlay.Selectcueonopen == 0 :
				iop.Mv.par.Curcue = 0
			elif ipar.MvPlay.Selectcueonopen == 1 :
				iop.Mv.par.Curcue = ipar.MvPlay.Cueonopen.eval()

		elif ipar.MvPlay.Overridephaseonopen == 'time' :
			ipar.MvPlay.Iphase = ext.MvPlay.ConvertTimeToPhase(ipar.MvPlay.Timeonopen)
			if ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen > -1 :
				iop.Mv.par.Play = ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen.eval()

		elif ipar.MvPlay.Overridephaseonopen == 'no' :
			ipar.MvPlay.Iphase = iop.Mv.par.Phase
			if ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen > -1 :
				iop.Mv.par.Play = ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen.eval()

		timer.lastCycle()

	elif cycle>120 :
		movieinfo.par.reloadpulse.pulse()
		timer.goTo(segment=op('segments')['loadinfo',0].row)


def load():
	iop.MvTimer.par.active = 0

	moviein.preload()


def loadCheck(cycle):
	# cannot rely on isFullyPreRead to go on
	if moviein.isFullyPreRead and not moviein.isPreloading  :
	#if not moviein.isPreloading  :

		op('cache').par.active = 1
		op('tile').cook()
		op('audiomovie').lock = False
		op('tile').cook()
		op('endCueBlackZero').lock = False
		op('endCueBlackZero').cook(force=True)
		timer.lastCycle()

	elif cycle>120 :
		moviein.par.reloadpulse.pulse()
		timer.goTo(segment=op('segments')['load',0].row)


def delay():
	moviein.par.play = 1


def fadeIn():
	iop.MvTimer.par.active = 1
	iop.MvTimer.par.start.pulse()

	if ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen == -1 :
		play = parent.MvPlay.par.Onsourcechange == 'start'
		ipar.MvPlay.Status = 'running' if play else 'ready'
		parent.MvPlay.par.Play = play
	else:
		ipar.MvPlay.Status = 'running' if ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen==1 else 'ready'
		parent.MvPlay.par.Play = ipar.MvPlay.Playonopen==1

	ipar.MvPlay.Newsourcepending = False
